create_active_memory.description: Allows the model to create active memory.
rules: When user asks to remember, remind, track, ask later, or keep a pending live-session condition, emit fulfilled <CREATE_ACTIVE_MEMORY: CONDITIONS >
CONDITIONS is a placeholder word; replace it with description, value, or conditions.
Always use CREATE_ACTIVE_MEMORY for generic non-summary remember/store/track/remind requests.
Use CREATE_ACTIVE_MEMORY for word recall tests and next-N-message reminders.
